title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Care Ratings

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Care Ratings
jsonLd.description:
Care Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Care Ratings:
Care Ratings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
